nasb.text: But the man of God said to the king, “If you were to give me half your house I would not go with you, nor would I eat bread or drink water in this place.

esv.text: And the man of God said to the king, “If you give me half your house, I will not go in with you. And I will not eat bread or drink water in this place,

cnv.text: 神人對王說：“你就是把王宮的一半給我，我也不會與你回去，也不在這地方吃飯喝水。

ccb.text: 上帝的仆人却说：“你就是把你一半的财富送给我，我也不跟你去，也不在这地方用饭喝水，
